---
import type { ComponentProps } from "astro/types"

import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"

type Props = ComponentProps<typeof Button>

const { ...props } = Astro.props
---

<Button data-slot="alert-dialog-trigger" {...props}>
  <slot />
</Button>

---
import type { ComponentProps } from "astro/types"

import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"

type Props = ComponentProps<typeof Button>

const { ...props } = Astro.props
---

<Button data-slot="alert-dialog-action" {...props}>
  <slot />

---
import type { ComponentProps } from "astro/types"

import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"

type Props = ComponentProps<typeof Button>

const { variant = "outline", ...props } = Astro.props
---

<Button data-slot="alert-dialog-cancel" variant={variant} {...props}>
  <slot />
</Button>

export { default as AlertDialog } from "./alert-dialog.astro"
export { default as AlertDialogAction } from "./alert-dialog-action.astro"
export { default as AlertDialogCancel } from "./alert-dialog-cancel.astro"
export { default as AlertDialogContent } from "./alert-dialog-content.astro"
export { default as AlertDialogDescription } from "./alert-dialog-description.astro"
export { default as AlertDialogFooter } from "./alert-dialog-footer.astro"
export { default as AlertDialogHeader } from "./alert-dialog-header.astro"
export { default as AlertDialogMedia } from "./alert-dialog-media.astro"
export { default as AlertDialogOverlay } from "./alert-dialog-overlay.astro"
export { default as AlertDialogPortal } from "./alert-dialog-portal.astro"
export { default as AlertDialogTitle } from "./alert-dialog-title.astro"
export { default as AlertDialogTrigger } from "./alert-dialog-trigger.astro"
